subcodes.first_line: The Book of God proclaimeth the truth before the faces of His servants. God - there is no God but Him, the Single, the One, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله ینطق بالحق امام وجوه العباد الله لا اله الا هو الفرد الواحد العلیم
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
